stemHtml: Ice contamination during flight will result in:

options.a: Increasing stall speed and increasing critical angle of attack, reduced CLMAX.
options.b: Increasing stall speed and decreasing critical angle of attack, increased CLMAX.
options.c: Increasing stall speed and decreasing critical angle of attack, reduced CLMAX.
options.d: Decreasing stall speed and decreasing critical angle of attack, increased CLMAX.
